description_for_human: Read and manage the signed-in user's Outlook calendar via the Microsoft Work IQ Calendar MCP service (mcp_CalendarTools).

functions.name: ListEvents
functions.description: Retrieve a list of events for the user with given criteria — start/end datetimes, title, attendee emails. Returns only the master event for recurring meetings.

functions.name: ListCalendarView
functions.description: Retrieve calendar occurrences within a specified time range with recurring meetings expanded into individual instances. Prefer over ListEvents for day/week views.

functions.name: CreateEvent
functions.description: Create a new calendar event. Supports recurring events, attendees, and online meetings. Set isOnlineMeeting=true and onlineMeetingProvider='teamsForBusiness' for Teams meetings.

functions.name: UpdateEvent
functions.description: Update an existing calendar event by ID. Can change subject, body, start, end, location, attendees, recurrence.

functions.name: DeleteEventById
functions.description: Delete a calendar event by ID without notifying attendees.

functions.name: CancelEvent
functions.description: Cancel a calendar event as the organizer and notify all attendees.

functions.name: ForwardEvent
functions.description: Forward a calendar event to additional attendees.

functions.name: AcceptEvent
functions.description: Accept a calendar event invitation. Optional comment + sendResponse.

functions.name: TentativelyAcceptEvent
functions.description: Tentatively accept a calendar event invitation.

functions.name: FindMeetingTimes
functions.description: Suggest meeting times based on organizer and attendee availability. meetingDuration is ISO 8601 (e.g. 'PT1H').

functions.name: GetRooms
functions.description: Get the list of bookable meeting rooms available to the signed-in user.

functions.name: GetUserDateAndTimeZoneSettings
functions.description: Get the signed-in user's mailbox date format and preferred time zone — use to render datetimes in the user's locale.

functions.name: GetOnlineMeetingAiInsights
functions.description: Get AI-generated insights (summary, action items) for a Teams online meeting after it has ended.

functions.name: GetOnlineMeetingAttendanceReports
functions.description: Get attendance reports for a Teams online meeting (who joined, when, for how long).

functions.name: GetOnlineMeetingTranscripts
functions.description: Get the transcript of a Teams online meeting after it has ended.
